case_title: KEVIN SULLIVAN HEATING & AIR INC. VS. SIGNATURE HOMES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,060.00 FILED BY KEVIN SULLIVAN HEATING & AIR INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SIGNATURE HOMES, INC. A CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
